providerNotReady: That social sign-in provider is not ready.
signupRestricted: Account creation is closed by the server administrator. Ask an administrator to create your server account, then sign in.
emailNotReady: Email is not ready. Check the Cloudflare Email Service settings.
verificationNotAccepted: That verification code was not accepted.
recoveryNotAccepted: That recovery code was not accepted.
codeExpired: That sign-in code or link is no longer valid.
invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
accountExists: An account already exists for this email. Sign in instead.
tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
serviceUnavailable: The sign-in service is unavailable. Check your connection and try again.
authOriginMismatch: The app and authentication server addresses do not match. Reload this tab or check the server's allowed origins.
authRejected: The server rejected the authentication request. Check the account or server policy and try again.
linkMissingToken: This sign-in link is missing its token.
actionMissingToken: This account action link is missing its token.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
passwordComplexity: Use upper and lower case letters, a number, and a symbol.
guestLocalOnly: Guest access is only available in local development.
totpHint: Use the six-digit code from your authenticator app.
recoveryHint: Use one of your saved recovery codes.
name: Name
passwordRequirements: Use 10 or more characters with upper and lower case letters, a number, and a symbol.
forgotPasswordBody: Enter your account email. If an account exists, Hanji will send a single-use reset link.
passwordResetSent: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent.
resetPasswordBody: Use at least 10 characters with upper and lower case letters, a number, and a symbol.
passwordResetComplete: Your password has been reset. Sign in with the new password.
emailVerified: Your email address has been verified.
emailChangeVerified: Your new email address has been confirmed.
setupBody: Create the first server administrator. Hanji will sign you in when setup is complete.
setupCodePlaceholder: Paste the code from the container log
setupCodeHint: Find the one-time code in the Hanji container log. It is never sent to this page automatically.
setupCodeRequired: Enter the setup code from the container log.
setupInvalidCode: That setup code is not valid.
setupAlreadyComplete: This server has already been set up or claimed. Sign in with its administrator account.
setupFailed: Server setup failed. Check the container log and try again.
setupBlockedBody: This instance has no accounts yet and no master account was provided. Restart the server with the master credentials:
setupBlockedHint: The master account is created automatically on the next start.
mustChangeBody: Your account was issued a temporary password by an administrator. Choose your own password to continue.
passwordMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
